headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: https://img.youtube.com https://i.ytimg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
